mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_audit_finding WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_audit_finding WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_audit_finding WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_audit_finding WHERE audit_id = #{auditId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_audit_finding WHERE audit_id = #{auditId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_audit_finding WHERE severity = #{severity} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_audit_finding WHERE severity = #{severity} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_audit_finding WHERE finding_id LIKE #{prefix} + '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_audit_finding ( finding_id, audit_id, severity, description, legal_ref, responsible_name, responsible_dept, due_date, status, notes, deleted, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{findingId}, #{auditId}, #{severity}, #{description}, #{legalRef}, #{responsibleName}, #{responsibleDept}, #{dueDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{status}, #{notes}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_audit_finding SET severity = #{severity}, description = #{description}, legal_ref = #{legalRef}, responsible_name = #{responsibleName}, responsible_dept = #{responsibleDept}, due_date = #{dueDate,jdbcType=DATE}, status = #{status}, notes = #{notes}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_audit_finding SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
